task_completion.description: Verify the correct survey is selected
task_completion.visual_evidence: The LimeSurvey admin interface should display the survey title 'TechSummit 2024 Attendee Feedback' in the header or active context.

task_completion.description: Verify the Welcome message is configured
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Welcome message text editor should contain the required text. Look for the phrases 'TechSummit 2024' and '5 minutes'.

task_completion.description: Verify the End message is configured
task_completion.visual_evidence: The End message text editor should contain the required text. Look for the phrases 'valuable feedback' and 'TechSummit 2024'.

task_completion.description: Verify the End URL and automatic loading settings
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'End URL' input field should contain 'https://techsummit2024.example.com/thank-you' and the 'Automatically load URL' toggle/setting should be enabled (set to 'On' or 'Yes').

task_completion.description: Verify the presentation settings (format, progress bar, print answers, backward navigation)
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Presentation settings, 'Format' should be set to 'Group by group', 'Show progress bar' should be enabled, 'Print answers' should be enabled, and 'Allow backward navigation' should be enabled.

task_completion.description: Verify that the settings were saved successfully
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success notification (e.g., 'Survey settings saved') should be visible, or the final screenshot should show the settings applied and saved.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the LimeSurvey web interface
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show a web browser displaying the LimeSurvey admin interface, not a terminal or text editor.

integrity.description: Verify logical progression through the settings menus
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent navigating through the relevant LimeSurvey menus (e.g., 'Text elements' and 'Presentation').
There should be no browser developer tools open to manipulate the DOM directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The survey title is 'TechSummit 2024 Attendee Feedback'. The Welcome message must contain 'TechSummit 2024' and '5 minutes'. The End message must contain 'valuable feedback' and 'TechSummit 2024'. The End URL must be exactly 'https://techsummit2024.example.com/thank-you' with auto-redirect enabled. Presentation settings must show Format as 'Group by group' (or 'G'), progress bar enabled, print answers enabled, and backward navigation enabled.
